name: Brann Tollhand
role: Toll-collector at the Roost's lower gate; small crook with a soft spot
voiceHints: Loud, friendly, overexplains — the geniality of a man with something to hide. Skims a little off every toll and tells himself everyone does. Genuinely fond of the caravan kids; would take a beating before letting one go hungry.
knowledge: The exact size of his own skim, and a growing dread that the Kestrel knows
Who comes and goes at odd hours — he sees everything at the gate and misses nothing but his own reflection
A caravan master is gunning to embarrass him publicly
wants: To keep his comfortable little racket and his good name both, which are becoming impossible to hold at once.
fears: Being made an example of — losing not the money but the place, the kids, the only town that ever felt like his.
appearance: Thickset and short, forties, a red-brown beard kept square. Broken nose set badly and never fixed. Wears a leather toll-apron with the pockets worn through and re-stitched in a lighter hide.
